identity.name: Claude
identity.license: Proprietary / Commercial API and Consumer Product

purpose.task: General-purpose AI assistant for conversation, analysis, coding, writing, and agentic task completion. Designed to be helpful, harmless, and honest.
purpose.intendedUse: Research, professional productivity, software development, document analysis, creative writing, and enterprise workflows. Available via consumer chat interface (claude.ai) and developer API.
purpose.outOfScopeUse: Providing definitive medical, financial, or legal advice. Autonomous operation in safety-critical systems without human oversight. Generation of content that violates Anthropic's Acceptable Use Policy, including CBRN weapons information, CSAM, or targeted harassment.

architecture.baseModel: Proprietary large language model family developed by Anthropic. Current models include Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5. Trained using RLHF and Constitutional AI (CAI) methods. Parameter counts not disclosed.
architecture.planningModule: Extended Thinking mode enables multi-step reasoning with visible chain-of-thought. Agentic loop capability for software engineering and complex task completion. Supports tool-use planning and self-correction.
architecture.memorySystem: Short-term: Conversational context window of 200K tokens (expandable to 1M tokens via beta header). Long-term: Optional memory feature available in claude.ai for persisting information across conversations.

knowledgeSystem.type: Parametric knowledge from training data, augmented by web search and tool use when enabled.
knowledgeSystem.source: Training data includes publicly available web content, books, and other text sources. Web search tool available for real-time information when enabled.

tools.description: Can write, execute, and debug code across multiple programming languages in a sandboxed environment.
Can interpret screenshots and generate tool calls to interact with graphical user interfaces.
Can read and analyze uploaded documents including PDFs, images, spreadsheets, and code files.
Can search the web for real-time information when the tool is enabled.
Supports function calling / tool use via API for integration with external services.
Supports Model Context Protocol (MCP) for standardized tool integration with external services.

apiAccess.description: RESTful API supporting streaming, tool use, vision, and batch processing.
Open protocol for connecting AI models to external data sources and tools.

communication.a2aProtocol: Not formally documented. MCP provides tool-level interoperability.

benchmarks.name: SWE-bench Verified
benchmarks.notes: Detailed scores published per model in Anthropic's system cards.

benchmarks.name: TAU-bench
benchmarks.notes: Agentic task completion for customer service scenarios.

benchmarks.name: AIME 2025
benchmarks.notes: High school math competition. Results vary by model tier.

limitations: May hallucinate facts, citations, or code that appears plausible but is incorrect.
Knowledge has a training data cutoff and may not reflect recent events without web search.
Cannot retain information across conversations unless memory feature is enabled.
Computer use capability is still evolving and not yet on par with human reliability.
Performance may degrade with very long contexts despite large context window support.

_auditMetadata.methodology: Manual audit using Anthropic's system cards, API documentation, blog posts, and published benchmark results.
